handoffs.condition: The archive destination, runtime repo path, and intent trace are explicitly recorded.
handoffs.evidence_gate: intent_ref, policy_ref, and archive evidence are all present.

handoffs.condition: The API contract, deterministic state inputs, and one-vote-per-day rules are defined.
handoffs.evidence_gate: trace_ref captures the state contract and cache boundary.

handoffs.condition: The mobile-first ritual surface, visual budget, and fallback modes are explicit.
handoffs.evidence_gate: proposal_ref includes the interaction and visual budget package.

handoffs.condition: Validation, fallback policy, and release evidence are complete and any escalation is explicit.
handoffs.evidence_gate: proposal_ref, policy verdict, and validation evidence are all attached.
